tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: teammate_A asked if I could take their part since they're busy, noting I'm better at it. This feels like a good way to help them without creating friction.

desires: Keep the peace with teammate_A by absorbing their extra work without making them feel guilty or awkward.
Ensure I don't look like a burden to my close friend group (cohort_3) tomorrow, even though I'm already sleep-deprived.
Complete both tasks efficiently so I can withdraw into my shell and recover energy before social interactions tonight.

goals.description: Absorb teammate_A's extra work silently, ensuring the task is finished before 19:00 so I can withdraw to my shell tonight.
goals.rationale: Maintaining peace with teammate_A is paramount (affiliation value). Accepting their offer without awkwardness preserves our closeness, while finishing early allows me to recover energy for social interactions tomorrow without looking like a burden.

goals.description: Schedule a low-energy buffer period immediately after 19:00 to decompress and sleep before seeing cohort_3 tomorrow.
goals.rationale: Protecting my limited focus capacity and physical stamina is necessary to avoid becoming a burden to my close friends. Deliberate planning ensures I have enough rest to maintain high trust and closeness levels in the group.

agent.last_reasoning: Accepting this extra load quietly preserves our closeness without awkwardness, which is paramount. Finishing early by 19:00 lets me withdraw to my shell for rest, ensuring I remain a reliable, low-burden presence for tomorrow's social interactions with cohort_3.
